name: Alice Johnson
review: Absolutely fantastic experience! The staff was incredibly welcoming and the coffee was the best I've had in the city. Will definitely become a regular.

name: Bob Smith
review: The service was quite slow today. We waited nearly 30 minutes just to get our drinks
column4: and the tables weren't cleaned properly.

name: Charlie Davis
review: Solid place to work for a few hours. The wifi is fast and the atmosphere is chill. Prices are a bit high though.

name: Diana Miller
review: Terrible customer service. The barista was extremely rude when I asked to change my order. Would not recommend.

name: Evan Wright
review: Wow! The new manager really turned this place around. Everything is spotless
column4: and the pastries are always fresh. 10/10.

name: Fiona Lee
column4: but not bad either. Just your average neighborhood shop.
